task_completion.description: Create a Problem record with the correct title and priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Problem form or details page displaying a title containing 'Faulty Network Switch IDF-A2' or 'Building A Connectivity Failures'. The Impact and Urgency fields should both be set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Link service requests 1001, 1003, and 1004 to the Problem as related incidents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Related Requests', 'Incidents', or 'Linked Tickets' section on the Problem record showing three entries corresponding to ticket IDs 1001 (keyboard), 1003 (printer), and 1004 (VPN).

task_completion.description: Document the Root Cause Analysis with root cause, symptoms, and workaround.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Analysis or RCA section of the Problem showing populated fields: Root Cause mentioning 'firmware bug CSCvz12345', Symptoms mentioning 'connectivity' and 'Building A', and a Workaround mentioning port bounce or 'shutdown'.

task_completion.description: Create an Emergency Change Request with backout plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Change Request form or details page with title containing 'Emergency Firmware Upgrade' and 'Catalyst 9300'. The Change Type should be 'Emergency' and Impact 'High'. A Backout Plan section should contain text referencing 'IOS-XE 17.6.3' or 'install remove inactive'.

task_completion.description: Link the Change Request to the Problem record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Related Problems', 'Linked Problems', or 'Associations' section on the Change showing the Problem record, OR look at the Problem's 'Related Changes' section showing the Change.

task_completion.description: Create a Knowledge Base solution article documenting the issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a solution article in the Solutions module with title containing 'Cisco Catalyst 9300 Port Failures' or 'CSCvz12345'. The article body should describe the root cause and resolution.

task_completion.description: Resolve the Problem with resolution referencing the emergency change.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Problem status field showing 'Resolved' (or 'Closed'). A resolution or closure comments field should contain text referencing the emergency change or firmware upgrade.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus UI with proper menus, tabs, and buttons, not a terminal window executing curl or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual ServiceDesk Plus application, not a mock or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be a functional web application with the ManageEngine branding, proper navigation, and working forms.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer console open modifying the DOM to artificially display required statuses, linked entities, or form content.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Problem title must contain 'Faulty Network Switch IDF-A2' or 'Building A Connectivity Failures'. Impact and Urgency must both be High. Linked incidents must include IDs 1001, 1003, and 1004. The RCA must mention firmware bug 'CSCvz12345'. The Change Request must be type 'Emergency' with title containing 'Firmware Upgrade' and 'Catalyst 9300'. The Change must be linked to the Problem. A KB article must exist with 'CSCvz12345' or 'Catalyst 9300 Port Failures' in the title. The Problem must end in 'Resolved' status.
